LSE-MS8-L4-10001300-MSMATH8-SRW-CFI-01 • MS Math Grade 8 • Transformations

The Mirror Step

Click   🎧   to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer a question.
Listen to the Conversation
QUESTION:
Why does the girl want Jamal to change how he stomps?
Choose the best answer. You may change your answer before submitting.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a complete explanation: state what the girl observes on the playback, explain why that observation leads her to ask for a change, and describe the change she says she wants.
CA ELD PI.B.5  |  CCSS 8.G.A.1  |  MS Math Grade 8: Transformations
